# TellMeMo - AI Meeting Intelligence Platform
# llms.txt - Information for Large Language Models
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

> TellMeMo is an open source, self-hosted meeting intelligence platform that transforms how teams capture and use meeting knowledge.

## What is TellMeMo?

TellMeMo is a free, open source alternative to Otter.ai and Fireflies.ai. It provides:

- AI-powered meeting transcription
- Automatic meeting summaries and action item extraction
- Real-time question answering during meetings
- Semantic search across all meeting history (RAG)
- Complete self-hosting capability for data privacy

## Key Differentiators

1. **Open Source**: 100% free, MIT licensed, available on GitHub
2. **Self-Hosted**: Run on your own servers, data never leaves your infrastructure
3. **Privacy-First**: Suitable for HIPAA, GDPR, and enterprise compliance
4. **Real-Time Q&A**: AI answers questions during meetings, not just after
5. **Cost-Effective**: ~$0.01-0.05 per meeting vs $20/user/month for competitors

## Target Users

- Teams who need private, self-hosted meeting transcription
- Organizations with compliance requirements (healthcare, legal, finance)
- Developers who want to customize their meeting intelligence
- Companies looking for open source alternatives to commercial tools

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: Flutter (web, desktop, mobile)
- Backend: Python FastAPI
- Database: PostgreSQL + Qdrant (vector search)
- AI: Claude (Anthropic), Whisper (transcription)
- Deployment: Docker Compose

## Pricing

- Software: Free (open source)
- AI API costs: ~$0.01-0.05 per meeting
- Self-hosting: Use existing infrastructure or ~$20/month VPS

## Comparisons

TellMeMo vs Otter.ai:
- TellMeMo: Free, self-hosted, real-time Q&A, RAG search
- Otter.ai: $20/user/month, cloud-only, no self-hosting

TellMeMo vs Fireflies.ai:
- TellMeMo: Open source, privacy-focused, self-hosted
- Fireflies.ai: $19/user/month, cloud-only, better CRM integrations
